channel.title: Github on ijadux2's website
channel.description: Recent content in Github on ijadux2's website

item.title: Opensource
item.description:
The Open Source Philosophy: Freedom, AI, and Community

To me, open source is more than a development model; it is a global social network of intellect. It connects minds across borders, proving that when we share our “bricks,” we can build cathedrals that no single person could create alone.

Beyond Freedom: The Power of “Wings”

Many talk about the “freedom” of open source, but for me, it is about empowerment. It gives me the wings to experiment, to fail, and to eventually soar.
